title: Windows UAC Bypass Attempt
description: Detects common UAC bypass techniques including fodhelper, eventvwr, and sdclt abuse. These auto-elevate binaries can be hijacked via registry to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*fodhelper.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*eventvwr.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*sdclt.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/kickoffelev*') or ('Process Name' like '*cmstp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/au*'))
falsepositives: Legitimate use of fodhelper for language settings
